channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recoverin…
item.author: Governor Tim Walz (@governorwalz.mn.gov)
item.description:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.
item.content:encoded:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.

item.title: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page …
item.author: Amy Mode Activated 🪷 ᓚᘏᗢ ಇ. (@activateamymode.bsky.social)
item.description: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page paper from a single Funk & Wagnalls entry or from reading only the CliffsNotes. 🤣
item.content:encoded: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page paper from a single Funk & Wagnalls entry or from reading only the CliffsNotes. 🤣

item.title: Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came chargi…
item.author: Stoned Yeti 👽 (@stonedmcyeti.bsky.social)
item.description:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶
item.content:encoded:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶

item.title: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. H…
item.author: Alt National Park Service (@altnps.bsky.social)
item.description: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.
item.content:encoded: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.

item.title: As the climate phenomenon sends warm water surging across th…
item.author: WIRED (@wired.com)
item.description: As the climate phenomenon sends warm water surging across the eastern Pacific, some parts of the fishing industry are suffering—but other regions are seeing a windfall. www.wired.com/story/el-nin...
item.content:encoded: As the climate phenomenon sends warm water surging across the eastern Pacific, some parts of the fishing industry are suffering—but other regions are seeing a windfall. www.wired.com/story/el-nin...

item.title: Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing …
item.author: Eloise Powers (@elnopower.bsky.social)
item.description:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma
item.content:encoded:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma

item.title: 📰 本日のAI・テックニュース（抜粋） 1. Dumb Co がiPhoneからハッキングされた折りたたみ携帯への買…
item.author: GRIM×AI秘書MIRA (@grim1149.bsky.social)
item.description:
📰 本日のAI・テックニュース（抜粋）

1. Dumb Co がiPhoneからハッキングされた折りたたみ携帯への買い替えを挑戦させてくれた
2. Oratomicが3億ドルを調達、わずか2万キュービットで実用的な量子コンピュータの構築を目指す
3. エヌビディアの主要メモリ供給企業が米国株式市場で時価総額1兆ドルを超える上場を果たす

本日の注目ニュース全10本はnoteで → https://note.com/grim1149/m/m7fde0cd2638a
📮 全件＋詳細はメルマガで → https://grimmiraai.substack.com/

#AIニュース #Cha...
item.content:encoded:
📰 本日のAI・テックニュース（抜粋）

1. Dumb Co がiPhoneからハッキングされた折りたたみ携帯への買い替えを挑戦させてくれた
2. Oratomicが3億ドルを調達、わずか2万キュービットで実用的な量子コンピュータの構築を目指す
3. エヌビディアの主要メモリ供給企業が米国株式市場で時価総額1兆ドルを超える上場を果たす

本日の注目ニュース全10本はnoteで → https://note.com/grim1149/m/m7fde0cd2638a
📮 全件＋詳細はメルマガで → https://grimmiraai.substack.com/

#AIニュース #Cha...

item.title: 脈なし察し、防ぐ恋のすれ違い 企画展で300人の失恋エピ分析 www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
脈なし察し、防ぐ恋のすれ違い　企画展で300人の失恋エピ分析
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

「脈なしを知らないことは、交通ルールを学ばず道路に飛び出すようなものである」。

東京・渋谷で開かれている企画展「脈なし研究センター」では、恋愛の不幸な事故を防ぐため、相手との距離感を察するスキルを磨けます。
item.content:encoded:
脈なし察し、防ぐ恋のすれ違い　企画展で300人の失恋エピ分析
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

「脈なしを知らないことは、交通ルールを学ばず道路に飛び出すようなものである」。

東京・渋谷で開かれている企画展「脈なし研究センター」では、恋愛の不幸な事故を防ぐため、相手との距離感を察するスキルを磨けます。

item.description: Doggy Daycare Fun Time 🤩
item.content:encoded: Doggy Daycare Fun Time 🤩

item.title: How many Irish people have ever experienced the wonder of ol…
item.author: Eoghan Daltun 🌍 (@irishrainforest.bsky.social)
item.description:
How many Irish people have ever experienced the wonder of old-growth natural forest in our own country?

Given that it now covers less than 0.1% (<1/1,000th) of Ireland, likely only a tiny few. What a terribly sad thought.

Allowing surviving remnants to expand naturally should be a *top* priority.
item.content:encoded:
How many Irish people have ever experienced the wonder of old-growth natural forest in our own country?

Given that it now covers less than 0.1% (<1/1,000th) of Ireland, likely only a tiny few. What a terribly sad thought.

Allowing surviving remnants to expand naturally should be a *top* priority.

item.title: 【有明海のムツゴロウに「恋の季節」】 佐賀県有明水産振興センターによると、ムツゴロウは約15～20センチに成長するハゼ科…
item.author: 産経ニュース (@sankei.com)
item.description:
【有明海のムツゴロウに「恋の季節」】
佐賀県有明水産振興センターによると、ムツゴロウは約15～20センチに成長するハゼ科の魚類で、陸上でも呼吸ができる。国内では有明海と八代海の干潟にのみ生息。「求愛ジャンプ」は、繁殖期である5～7月ごろの干潮時に見られる。
item.content:encoded:
【有明海のムツゴロウに「恋の季節」】
佐賀県有明水産振興センターによると、ムツゴロウは約15～20センチに成長するハゼ科の魚類で、陸上でも呼吸ができる。国内では有明海と八代海の干潟にのみ生息。「求愛ジャンプ」は、繁殖期である5～7月ごろの干潮時に見られる。

item.title: Pörri tiedottaa: Pahvilaatikot eivät yksin riitä. Palvelu…
item.author: Taavi Horila (@taavihorila.bsky.social)
item.description:
Pörri tiedottaa:

Pahvilaatikot eivät yksin riitä.

Palvelushenkilökunnan on järjestettävä myös sopivia putkia.

Tiedote päättyy.
item.content:encoded:
Pörri tiedottaa:

Pahvilaatikot eivät yksin riitä.

Palvelushenkilökunnan on järjestettävä myös sopivia putkia.

Tiedote päättyy.

item.title: It is so refreshing to watch a soccer match with no theatric…
item.author: DR. IRONCLAD, Brunch Democrat (@feclad.bsky.social)
item.description:
It is so refreshing to watch a soccer match with no theatrics, no flops, no whining...just playing

It's the women. I'm watching a women's game
item.content:encoded:
It is so refreshing to watch a soccer match with no theatrics, no flops, no whining...just playing

It's the women. I'm watching a women's game

item.title: In 2024, journalist Lila Hassan identified 18 ICE shootings …
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
In 2024, journalist Lila Hassan identified 18 ICE shootings that involved a moving vehicle between 2015 and 2021. Over that same time period, public records show ICE agents shooting at least 59 people total and killing at least 23.

Not a single indictment resulted from those incidents.
item.content:encoded:
In 2024, journalist Lila Hassan identified 18 ICE shootings that involved a moving vehicle between 2015 and 2021. Over that same time period, public records show ICE agents shooting at least 59 people total and killing at least 23.

Not a single indictment resulted from those incidents.

item.title: Black leaders across the South have expressed a visceral sho…
item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description:
Black leaders across the South have expressed a visceral shock in the wake of the Supreme Court’s decision gutting the Voting Rights Act.

But as the surprise wears off, a sense of isolation has begun to set in among some.

🔗 politi.co/4vSW46T
item.content:encoded:
Black leaders across the South have expressed a visceral shock in the wake of the Supreme Court’s decision gutting the Voting Rights Act.

But as the surprise wears off, a sense of isolation has begun to set in among some.

🔗 politi.co/4vSW46T

item.title: "Viriditas" is a reminder that growth isn’t always loud. Som…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: "Viriditas" is a reminder that growth isn’t always loud. Sometimes it arrives slowly, one new leaf at a time, until one day you look around and realize the whole landscape has come alive.
item.content:encoded: "Viriditas" is a reminder that growth isn’t always loud. Sometimes it arrives slowly, one new leaf at a time, until one day you look around and realize the whole landscape has come alive.

item.title: Momma brings her baby to meet her handler💙💙
item.author: Democrat Cats (@democratcats.bsky.social)
item.description: Momma brings her baby to meet her handler💙💙
item.content:encoded: Momma brings her baby to meet her handler💙💙
